name: Mom's Corned Beef Hash and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the cabbage with salt and pepper.
2. Brown onion in fat; add corned beef and break it up. (This works better if the can has been chilled first.)
3. Add cooked potatoes, milk, and seasonings. Simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Prepare and cook the cabbage.
5. Serve the hash and cabbage together.
